That Complete Source includes Covered Source

conditions.commentary: Weakly reciprocal: the reciprocal obligation attaches to the Covered Source (and modifications thereof), not to External Material interfaced with via a documented interface (see §1.8, §4.2). Available Components referenced by the design are excluded from Complete Source except for sufficient sourcing information.
Network/remote-use disclosure is not a natural concept for physical hardware products and is not addressed by CERN-OHL-W.

citations.note: 3.3(d) license the modified Covered Source under the terms and conditions of this Licence

Such modified Covered Source must be licensed as a whole, but excluding Available Components contained in it or External Material to which it is interfaced, which remain licensed under their own applicable licences
4.3 You may license Products under terms of Your choice, provided that such terms do not restrict ... rights under this Licence to the Covered Source

conditions.commentary: Weak (file/source-level) reciprocity: only the MODIFIED Covered Source must be licensed under CERN-OHL-W 2.0 as a whole. Available Components and External Material that interfaces via a documented interface remain under their own licences. A Product incorporating Covered Source may itself be licensed under terms of Your choice under §4.3. Contrast with CERN-OHL-S, which applies reciprocity at the whole-design level.

limitations.commentary: No affirmative trademark grant; §8.2 imposes a narrow endorsement/name-use restriction rather than a general denial of trademark rights.
